    • getModuleType

      public IModuleType<?> getModuleType()

    • process

      public void process(IRodinElement element, IInternalElement target, ISCStateRepository repository, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: ISCProcessorModule
      Runs the static checker module: process the element. The element itself has already been accepted.
      Parameters:
      element - the input "unchecked" element
      target - the target element (this may be a file or any other internal element)
      repository - the state repository to use
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem running this module

    • typeIdentifierSymbol

      protected void typeIdentifierSymbol(IIdentifierSymbolInfo newSymbolInfo, ITypeEnvironmentBuilder environment) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from class: IdentifierModule
      Adds type information about the given identifier symbol to the given type environment.

      This method is intended to be overridden by identifier modules that contribute to the type environment.

      Overrides:
      typeIdentifierSymbol in class IdentifierModule
      Parameters:
      newSymbolInfo - a new identifier symbol info
      environment - the type environment of the state repository
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the symbol table

    • createIdentifierSymbolInfo

      protected IIdentifierSymbolInfo createIdentifierSymbolInfo(String name, IIdentifierElement element)
      Description copied from class: IdentifierModule
      Creates a new instance of IIdentifierSymbolInfo
      Specified by:
      createIdentifierSymbolInfo in class IdentifierModule
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the identifier
      element - an element to which to attach problem markers
      Returns:
      a new instance of IIdentifierSymbolInfo
